name: @galerina/devtools-fungi-scan
description: Syntax-migration corpus scanner: walks every .fungi/.gate file and reports old-form usage, @version headers, match exhaustiveness and planned-keyword collisions — via the REAL compiler lexer, never regex.
note: 2026-07-08 syntax update instrument (docs/SYNTAX_UPDATE_PLAN.md W2). Detection is TOKEN-based on the real lexer because regex misses @-headers, no-space operator forms (x&&y) and dotted/slashed names. Enforcement stays in the compiler — this tool measures the corpus.
